hero.subtitle: Turn any material into a quiz in seconds. Upload learning materials (PDF, DOC, or Youtube URL) to let AI automatically generate interactive question sets customized to your learning style.

features.title: Revolutionize Your Learning Journey

generation.title: Automated Generation
generation.bullet1: Diverse sources: Upload PDFs, Videos, Images, YouTube links...
generation.bullet2: AI extracts knowledge & generates highly relevant questions.
generation.bullet3: Saves hours of manual quiz creation (Solves main pain point).

customization.title: Deep Customization
customization.bullet1: Adjust: Question types, difficulty, Bloom's cognitive levels.
customization.bullet2: Select purpose: Quick review, knowledge testing, or mock exams.
customization.bullet3: AI evaluates results and suggests key topics for review.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Learning
collaborative.bullet1: Share study materials and assign quizzes to the whole group.
collaborative.bullet2: Host real-time multiplayer challenges to boost engagement.
collaborative.bullet3: Leaders can manage and track individual member progress.

features.roadmapDesc: Our AI analyzes your materials and generates a step-by-step learning path from basics to advanced.
features.quizDesc: Generate multiple-choice or essay questions instantly from any PDF, YouTube video.
features.companionDesc: Interact with your AI tutor via voice to clear doubts and explain complex concepts in real-time.

testimonials.title: What our students are saying 😍
testimonials.student1Quote: "QuizMate AI completely changed how I prepare for my exams. Generating quizzes from lecture videos is a game changer!"
testimonials.student2Quote: "The AI Roadmap is incredible. It broke down my 200-page textbook into 10 logical learning phases. Highly recommend!"

footer.brandDesc: Empowering learners worldwide with AI-driven tools for a smarter learning future.
